pve_actions.name: Fast Blade
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.

pve_actions.name: Fight or Flight
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by 25%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Goring Blade Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Riot Blade
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 170.
Combo Action: Fast Blade
Combo Potency: 330
Combo Bonus: Restores MP

pve_actions.name: Total Eclipse
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity

pve_actions.name: Shield Bash
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: Stun
Duration: 6s

pve_actions.name: Iron Will
pve_actions.effect:
Significantly increases enmity generation.
Effect ends upon reuse.

pve_actions.name: Release Iron Will
pve_actions.effect: Cancels the effect of Iron Will.

pve_actions.name: Shield Lob
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a ranged attack with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity

pve_actions.name: Rage of Halone
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Combo Action: Riot Blade
Combo Potency: 330

pve_actions.name: Spirits Within
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 270.

pve_actions.name: Sheltron
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 15%.
Duration: 6s
Oath Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Sentinel
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 30%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Prominence
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity
Combo Action: Total Eclipse
Combo Potency: 220
Combo Bonus: Restores MP
Combo Bonus: Grants Divine Might
Divine Might Effect: Allows next Holy Spirit or Holy Circle to be cast immediately with increased potency
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Cover
pve_actions.effect:
Take all damage intended for another party member as long as said member remains within 20 yalms.
Does not activate with certain attacks.
Duration: 12s
Oath Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Circle of Scorn
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Damage over time
Potency: 30
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Hallowed Ground
pve_actions.effect:
Renders you impervious to most attacks.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Bulwark
pve_actions.effect:
Block incoming attacks.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Goring Blade
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 700.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Goring Blade Ready.

pve_actions.name: Divine Veil
pve_actions.effect:
Creates a barrier around self and all party members near you that absorbs damage equivalent to 10% of your maximum HP.
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Restores target's HP
Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Clemency
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 1,000
Additional Effect: Restores to self 50% of HP restored to target if target is a party member

pve_actions.name: Royal Authority
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Combo Action: Riot Blade
Combo Potency: 460
Combo Bonus: Grants Atonement Ready
Duration: 30s
Combo Bonus: Grants Divine Might
Divine Might Effect: Allows next Holy Spirit or Holy Circle to be cast immediately with increased potency
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Intervention
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces target party member's damage taken by 10%.
Duration: 8s
Additional Effect: Increases damage reduction by an additional 10% if Rampart or Guardian are active
Additional Effect: Grants Knight's Resolve to target
Knight's Resolve Effect: Reduces damage taken by 10%
Duration: 4s
Additional Effect: Grants Knight's Benediction to target
Knight's Benediction Effect: Gradually restores HP
Cure Potency: 250
Duration: 12s
Oath Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Holy Spirit
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 400.
Divine Might Potency: 500
Requiescat Potency: 700
The effect of Divine Might will be prioritized over Requiescat when under the effect of both.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Intervene
pve_actions.effect:
Rushes target and delivers an attack with a potency of 150.
Maximum Charges: 2
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Requiescat
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 320.
Additional Effect: Grants 4 stacks of Requiescat
Requiescat Effect: Increases the potency of Holy Spirit,Â Holy Circle, and all Confiteor combo actions, and spells will require no cast time
Additional Effect: Grants Confiteor Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Passage of Arms
pve_actions.effect:
Increases block rate to 100% and creates a designated area in a cone behind you in which party members will only suffer 85% of all damage inflicted.
Duration: 18s
Effect ends upon using another action or moving (including facing a different direction).
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Holy Circle
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Divine Might Potency: 250
Requiescat Potency: 350
The effect of Divine Might will be prioritized over Requiescat when under the effect of both.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Atonement
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 460.
Additional Effect: Restores MP
Additional Effect: Grants Supplication Ready
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Atonement Ready.

pve_actions.name: Supplication
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 500.
Additional Effect: Restores MP
Additional Effect: Grants Sepulchre Ready
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Supplication Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Atonement changes to Supplication when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Sepulchre
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 540.
Additional Effect: Restores MP
Can only be executed while under the effect of Sepulchre Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Supplication changes to Sepulchre when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Confiteor
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 500 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Requiescat Potency: 1,000
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400
Can only be executed while under the effect of Confiteor Ready. Effect fades upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Holy Sheltron
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 15%.
Duration: 8s
Additional Effect: Grants Knight's Resolve
Knight's Resolve Effect: Reduces damage taken by 15%
Duration: 4s
Additional Effect: Grants Knight's Benediction
Knight's Benediction Effect: Gradually restores HP
Cure Potency: 250
Duration: 12s
Oath Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Expiacion
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 450 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores MP

pve_actions.name: Blade of Faith
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 260 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Requiescat Potency: 760
Combo Action: Confiteor
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Confiteor changes to Blade of Faith when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Blade of Truth
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 380 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Requiescat Potency: 880
Combo Action: Blade of Faith
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Blade of Faith changes to Blade of Truth when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Blade of Valor
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 500 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Requiescat Potency: 1,000
Combo Action: Blade of Truth
Additional Effect: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 400
Additional Effect: Grants Blade of Honor Ready
Duration: 30s

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Blade of Truth changes to Blade of Valor when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Guardian
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 40%.
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equivalent to a heal of 1,000 potency
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Imperator
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 580 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants 4 stacks of Requiescat
Duration: 30s
Requiescat Effect: Increases the potency of Holy Spirit, Holy Circle, and all Confiteor combo actions, and spells will require no cast time
Additional Effect: Grants Confiteor Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Blade of Honor
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Blade of Honor Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Imperator changes to Blade of Honor when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Rampart
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 20%.
Additional Effect: Increases HP recovery via healing actions on self by 15%
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Low Blow
pve_actions.effect:
Stuns target.
Duration: 5s

pve_actions.name: Provoke
pve_actions.effect: Gesture threateningly, placing yourself at the top of a target's enmity list while gaining additional enmity.

pve_actions.name: Interject
pve_actions.effect: Interrupts the use of a target's action.

pve_actions.name: Reprisal
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage dealt by nearby enemies by 10%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Shirk
pve_actions.effect: Diverts 25% of enmity to target party member.

traits.name: Tank Mastery
traits.effect: Reduces damage taken by 20%. Furthermore, grants a bonus to maximum HP based on your vitality attribute, and a bonus to damage dealt based on your strength attribute.

traits.name: Oath Mastery
traits.effect: Increases Oath Gauge by 5 each time an auto-attack lands.

traits.name: Enhanced Fight or Flight
traits.effect:
Grants Goring Blade Ready upon executing Fight or Flight.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Chivalry
traits.effect: Restores MP when using Riot Blade or Spirits Within.

traits.name: Rage of Halone Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Rage of Halone to Royal Authority.

traits.name: Divine Magic Mastery
traits.effect:
Halves MP cost for all spells while preventing casting interruptions via damage taken. Grants the following effects after successfully completing a combo with Royal Authority:
Combo Bonus: Grants Divine Might
Divine Might Effect: Allows next Holy Spirit or Holy Circle to be cast immediately with increased potency
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Prominence
traits.effect:
Grants the following effects after successfully completing a combo with Prominence:
Combo Bonus: Restores MP
Combo Bonus: Grants Divine Might
Divine Might Effect: Allows next Holy Spirit or Holy Circle to be cast immediately with increased potency
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Sheltron
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Sheltron to 6 seconds.

traits.name: Sword Oath
traits.effect:
Grants Atonement Ready after successfully completing a combo with Royal Authority.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Requiescat
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Confiteor Ready upon landing Requiescat.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Sheltron Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Sheltron to Holy Sheltron.

traits.name: Enhanced Intervention
traits.effect:
Extends the duration of Intervention to 8 seconds.
Grants Knight's Resolve to target, reducing damage taken by 10%.
Duration: 4s
Grants Knight's Benediction to target, gradually restoring HP over time.
Cure Potency: 250
Duration: 12s

traits.name: Divine Magic Mastery II
traits.effect:
Adds a healing effect to Holy Spirit, Holy Circle, and Confiteor.
Cure Potency: 400

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fast Blade to 200, Riot Blade to 140, Royal Authority to 140, Holy Spirit to 350, Atonement to 400, Supplication to 420, and Sepulchre to 440.

traits.name: Spirits Within Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Spirits Within to Expiacion.

traits.name: Enhanced Divine Veil
traits.effect:
Adds a healing effect to Divine Veil.
Cure Potency: 400

traits.name: Sentinel Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Sentinel to Guardian.

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fast Blade to 220, Riot Blade to 170, Royal Authority to 200, Holy Spirit to 400, Atonement to 460, Supplication to 500, Sepulchre to 540, Confiteor to 500, Blade of Faith to 260, Blade of Truth to 380, and Blade of Valor to 500.

traits.name: Requiescat Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Requiescat to Imperator.

traits.name: Enhanced Blade of Valor
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Blade of Honor Ready upon landing Blade of Valor.
Duration: 30s
Imperator changes to Blade of Honor while under the effect of Blade of Honor Ready.

traits.name: Enhanced Rampart
traits.effect: Adds an additional effect to Rampart that increases HP recovery via healing actions on self by 15%.

traits.name: Enhanced Reprisal
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Reprisal to 15 seconds.
